data.body: 4214 remediation mapped (subagent a813c185). Option B era-at-storage-anchor. Changes: (1) trusted_env.py schema added_at_commit/revoked_at_commit -> added_at_log_position/revoked_at_log_position; (2) opcert.verify_opcert era check anchors on storage anchor S (introducing commit of envelope-bearing SIGNATURE event) not merged_log_commit; extract shared keys_valid_at_anchor helper in authorship.py; (3) new rebar trusted-env add|revoke CLI (_commands/trusted_env_cmd.py) stamping current tickets-tip log position; (4) verify_opcert.py resolves S via commit_map (mirror _close_anchor_event), fail-closed. CRUX RED test: cert with pre-revocation merged_log_commit but SIGNATURE stored AFTER revocation must FAIL key_not_valid_at_era (passes under current #664, fails under Option B). ~15 fixtures break on schema rename. Landing baseline: worktree work-4214 rebased on origin/main 4fc2bd086.
